stemHtml:
Given the following NOTAM information, what changes apply to NDB CF?

NEW TODAY TIL 1603312359 NDB REMAINS CF 367KHZ FROM 0000 TO 0900 NDB CF 367KHZ BECOMES ASM 367KHZ FROM 0900 TO 2359 REF TRIGGER NOTAM PERM AIRAC AIP AMDT 04/16 : NOTAM LF/F0403/16 >>> END OF BULLETIN <<<

options.a: NDB CF identifier changes from “CF” to “ASM” at 09:00 UTC on the given date.
options.b: NDB CF frequency changes to 367 kHz at 09:00 UTC on the given date.
options.c: NDB CF identifier changes to “ASM” at 09:00 UTC, and changes back to “CF” after 00:00 UTC.
options.d: NDB CF identifier changes from “CF” to “ASM” at 23:59 UTC on the given date.
